TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Mtlibu, title = Mtlibu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mtlibu} }

S.FORM: = Mtlibu = Ex: Bobo mnekan ido bbiyan, mtlibu ssiyo tama daha ka laqi. Pnyahan pnatis
S.PHON: = mtlibu = əx: bobo mnəkan ido bbijan, mtlibu ssijo tama daħa ka laqi. pnjaħan pnatis

S.PHON: = mtlibu = əx: bobo mnəkan ido bbijan, mtlibu ssijo tama daħa ka laqi. pnjaħan pnatis
